description: CompositionWhite flared sleeveless top made of 50% cotton and 505 modal, with floral print design, printed lettering on the front, elongated back hem and ruffles around the hemlineFittingRegularWash careCold hand wash separately ORCold delicate machine wash in garment bagWash garment inside outWash with like coloursDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryLine dry in shadeWarm iron on reverse sideDo not iron print/embellishmentDo not dry cleanTake feminine dressing to the next level in this white flared sleeveless top from forever new.
